scripts.build:pages: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dist='dist';const docs='docs';if(fs.existsSync(docs)){fs.rmSync(docs,{recursive:true,force:true});}fs.mkdirSync(docs);for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dist)){fs.cpSync(path.join(dist,f),path.join(docs,f),{recursive:true});}"
